# lane

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata piano-roll sustain-pedal lane: a scroll-synced strip marking pedal-down spans along the falling-note timeline.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.TransportOverlay` "pedal" → `PedalLane`
  - Uses:
    - `apps/sonata/shell.Sonata`
    - `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
